title: Squirrel Removal in Mamaroneck, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Mamaroneck, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts. Call for fast service: $900-$2,500.
intro: Squirrels in your Mamaroneck attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Mamaroneck and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your home from squirrel damage and re-entry.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Westchester County, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges Mamaroneck homeowners face with persistent squirrel populations. We offer same-day service, lifetime guarantees on exclusion work, and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.
localContext: Mamaroneck's tree-lined streets and mix of historic homes near Harbor Island Park and newer developments along the Long Island Sound waterfront create ideal conditions for squirrel activity year-round. The area's mature oak and maple trees provide abundant food sources that attract gray squirrels seeking attic access in both vintage Colonials and modern waterfront properties.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Mamaroneck typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work, and sanitation of affected areas.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Mamaroneck homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney caps, and construction gaps where different building materials meet. In Mamaroneck's older homes, deteriorating fascia boards and uncapped chimneys are frequent entry points, while newer homes may have builder gaps around gable vents.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to my Mamaroneck property?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), tearing insulation, damaging HVAC ducts, and contaminating spaces with urine and feces. They can also carry parasites like fleas, ticks, and mites that may spread to living areas.

faqs.question: What is the squirrel removal process?
faqs.answer: Our process includes a thorough inspection to identify entry points and assess damage, humane trapping and removal of all squirrels, sealing all entry points with chew-proof materials, sanitizing contaminated areas, and repairing insulation or structural damage. We also provide a warranty against re-entry.
